description: Test suite for backend API adapter functions, verifying mock and REST adapter behaviors, configuration selection, and endpoint calls.

methods.name: createMockAdapter
methods.description: Creates a mock adapter returning sample data.

methods.name: createRestAdapter
methods.description: Creates a REST adapter that interacts with the API endpoints.

methods.name: createBackendAdapter
methods.description: Creates adapter based on configuration, choosing mock or REST implementation.
